executionPlan: Read Constitution, contracts, and target stage contract. Read auditor report auditFacts (profileFacts, moduleInventory of 7 modules, securityBoundaries). Populated the four .company/memory/ template files with evidence-backed facts only: project-profile.md (stack/runtime/framework/scripts/deployment + hypothesis note on config ambiguity), modules.md (7 concise sections preserving verified/hypothesis labels, flagging OPENAI_API_KEY boundary), features.md (3 user-facing features), changelog.md (one dated entry). No product files touched.
summary: Populated portfolio's .company/memory/ with auditor-verified facts. Recorded Next.js 14.1.4 App Router stack (TypeScript strict, Node 22, npm, Vercel deployment), 7 module sections with dependencies/boundaries/commands, and 3 feature entries (3D talking avatar, content sections, SEO assets). Flagged OPENAI_API_KEY security boundary and config-file ambiguity hypothesis without exposing secrets.

criteria.criterion: project-profile.md verified profile section sourced only from profileFacts
criteria.evidence: Verified Profile section records facts from auditFacts.profileFacts (language, Node 22.x, Next.js 14.1.4 App Router, React 18, npm, 5 scripts + 'no test runner' note, RSC rendering, theming, 3D/animation/styling libs, Analytics, OpenAI Realtime API, Fonts, Vercel deployment)

criteria.criterion: modules.md one section per moduleInventory entry with template fields and preserved status
criteria.evidence: 7 sections (app router, realtime-session API, components/site, components/avatar, lib, data, public assets) using template fields; all marked verified per auditor

criteria.criterion: realtime-session/OPENAI_API_KEY boundary recorded without secret; config ambiguity as hypothesis
criteria.evidence: modules.md records server-only OPENAI_API_KEY boundary with no value; project-profile.md 'Configuration ambiguity (hypothesis)' records next.config.mjs vs next.config.ts + duplicate postcss
3 feature sections: talking-avatar hero, static portfolio content sections, SEO/OG/robots/sitemap assets, each with file mappings

criteria.criterion: changelog.md gains one dated TASK-001 entry
Only .company/memory/ modified; no product file touched

decisionsProposed: portfolio is onboarded as a Next.js 14.1.4 App Router single-page portfolio; future changes must protect app/api/realtime-session/route.ts as the sole security-sensitive boundary where OPENAI_API_KEY is accessed server-side only.
lessonsProposed: Auditor's evidence-backed facts (profileFacts, moduleInventory, securityBoundaries) formed the direct source for memory population; no inference was necessary for onboarding.
